subject: Re: [PATCH 3/3] sunrpc: split cache_detail queue into request and reader lists

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary:
Author acknowledged a concern about the order of patches and agreed to add a separate patch to address it before applying the rest.

Author acknowledged that there were issues with the spinlock in the patch, agreed to fix them in version 2.
reviews.raw_body:
Good catch. I'll add a patch to fix that preceding these patches, so it
can go to stable (if we think that's worthwhile).

---

Thanks for the review! I'll send a v2 with the spinlock fixes and the
above bugfix.
